calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: JPT Joseph Jedeikin, Clerk Karissa Shaw, not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Respondent; Mark F. Williams did not appear.
Appellant; Frances Pinnock, Esq. appearing on behalf of Appellant Via Lee Low

This cause came on regularly for trial de novo having been continued from 1/25/06.

The Court questions counsel Pinnock regarding the factual issues of the case. Counsel Pinnock informs the Court that her client would like to abandon her appeal.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court grants the abandonment of the appeal.

Order Dismissing Small Claims Appeal signed by the Court.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-18-2006 Continued To Jan-25-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-25-2006 Continued To Mar-08-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Joseph Jedeikin, clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for small claims appeal. No appearance by respondent Mark F. Williams, Frances Pinnock, esq. appears for appellant Lee Low. Ms. Pinnock requests a continuance and represents that respondent agrees with the request. Ms. Pinnock states that other related matters still in small claims will be settled in a couple of weeks. Ms. Pinnock asks that the matters be continued to allow time for that. This matter, and the two related matters (028041 & 028042) are continued to March 8, 2006. (Note: the files 028041 & 028042 were not included with 028008 on on Jan 25, 2006.)

Plaintiff(S)/Respondent(S) Mark F. Williams' Motion To Dismiss Defendant'S Appeal To The Denial Of Motion To Vacate
